description: CompositionPink printed tunic top made of  knitted 100% cotton, has black trims, a V-neck with a tie up detail, grown-on sleeves, lightly ruched shoulder seams, elastication below the bust line, lace detail along the neckline and top gathered to broad black panel at hemFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this tunic top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel, throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, tights and a floral scarf with this piece.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
